reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
저희 집 애기는 하루에도 펫티슈를 얼마나 쓰는 지 몰라요.
매일 산책에 쉬야에 응가에 여기저기 비비고 다니는 얼굴까지
그래서 늘 필요한 필수템이에요!!
많은 펫티슈를 써보지는 않았지만 몇 일 써본 결과 
제품력이 너무 좋아요! 뽑았을 때 정말 강하지 않은 은은한 향에
만져보니 아기 물티슈보다 부드럽더라구요 ❤️
그래서 자극없이 우리 강아지한테 닦여주기 너무 좋았어요!!
그리고 또 휴대용으로 간편하게 있다는 거~~~~
보통은 통으로 들고 다녔는데 이렇게 몇개씩 조금 들고 다닐 수 있으니 짐도 줄이고 정말 최고에요 👍🏻❤️
앞으로 필소굿에 정착하려 합니다☺️
reviews.content_en: You have no idea how many pet wipes our little one goes through in a day. Between daily walks, pee, poop, and rubbing their face all over the place, it's an absolute must-have! 😅 I haven't tried many pet wipes, but after using this for a few days, the product quality is amazing! The scent is really subtle and gentle when you pull it out, and it's even softer than baby wipes when you touch it ❤️ So it's perfect for wiping our pup without any irritation!! And the fact that it comes in a portable version too~~~~ Usually I carry around the whole container, but being able to just grab a few at a time really cuts down on luggage and it's just the best 👍🏻❤️ I'm planning to stick with PET GOOD from now on ☺️

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 일회용으로 낱개포장이라 들고다니기 너무편함! 산책시 주머니에 몇개 쏙 챙겨다니기
reviews.content_en: Individual packaging makes it super convenient to carry around! I just grab a few and pop them in my pocket when we go for a walk!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 저번에 구매하고 또 구매.산책때 들고나가기도 유용하고 개별포장이라 더좋네요
reviews.content_en: I bought it again after my last purchase. It's really useful to bring on walks and the individual packaging is great too!

reviews.name: 미****
reviews.content: 휴대용 할인 가격에 나와서 사봤어요~~. 소포장 되어있어서 좋네요~^^.
reviews.content_en: I picked this up on the portable version discount~~ The small packaging is nice~^^

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
낱개포장으로  되어 있어서 아이들 상책후 하나씩 사용하기 너무  편하고 자극이 심한거  같ㅈ 않아서 아이한테도  너무 젛아요
얼굴닦이기도 좋습니다 서비스도  너무  젛네요
reviews.content_en: It comes in individual packets so it's super convenient to use one at a time after walks with the kids, and it doesn't seem to be irritating at all so my kids love it too! It's also great for wiping their faces. The service is amazing too!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
산책할때 강아지엉덩이 닦아줄 용도로 구매했어요
한개씩 낱개포장 되어있어서 휴대하기도 좋고 간편해용
reviews.content_en: I bought this to wipe my dog's butt during walks. Each one comes individually wrapped so it's easy and convenient to carry!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 좋아서 낱개 50개 더 구매했습니다 바잇미는 사랑입니다 정말
reviews.content_en: I loved it so much I bought 50 more individual packets. BITE ME is love, seriously!

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content: 오자마자 애기 똥꼬 닦아봤는데 엄청 잘 닦여요 좋은 것 같아요
reviews.content_en: I tried wiping my pup's butt as soon as I got it and it worked amazingly well. Seems like a great product!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
외출시 1~2개씩 들고 다니기 좋아요
저자극이라서 안심하고 사용 할 수 있네용ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's perfect to carry 1-2 with me when going out! Since it's low-irritant, I can use it with peace of mind hehe

reviews.name: 표****
reviews.content:
산책을 매일매일하고 수풀도 마구 들어가는데다가 발에 털도 복실한 애기라서 산책 후 발닦기는 피할수없는 일과예요!
바잇미 발샴푸로 씻어주지만 매일 발을 씻기기엔 울애기 발바닥이 너무 건조해질까봐 걱정되서🥲 펫티슈로 꼼꼼히
닦아줘요! 세정력이 뛰어나서 발이 금방 깨끗해지는데다가 촉촉한 티슈라서 애기 발도 건조해지지 않더라구요 :)
사람용 물티슈는 산책시 묻은 먼지들이 잘 닦여나가지 않기땜에 펫티슈가 필수템!
원래 쓰던 타사 제품에 비해 통도 좀 더 작은 사이즈라 훨씬 실용적인 느낌이예요^^
휴대용도 있어서 간편하게 쓸수있고, 패키지 귀여운건 말해모해요😆
바잇미 제품은 가성비 월등해서 늘 믿고 쓰고, 만족도도 최고!!👍🏻
reviews.content_en: We go on walks every single day and my pup loves rushing into bushes, plus they have really fluffy paws, so wiping their paws after walks is unavoidable! 🥲 I use BITE ME paw shampoo to wash them, but I was worried about drying out my baby's paw pads from washing them every day, so I carefully wipe them with pet wipes instead! The cleansing power is excellent so the paws get clean right away, and since the wipes are moist, my pup's paws don't dry out either :) Regular human wet wipes don't clean off the dirt from walks very well, so pet wipes are a must-have! Compared to the other brand I used before, this one has a smaller, more practical container size^^ It also comes in a portable version so it's super convenient, and the packaging is just adorable 😆 BITE ME products have amazing value for money, so I always trust them and use them, and the satisfaction is top-notch!! 👍🏻

reviews.name: 미****
reviews.content:
바잇미 체험단을 하게 되어 너무 좋았어요. 예이~~♥️
레오는 매일 산책을 해서 펫티슈가 필수품인데 휴대용이랑 홈 케어 할 수 있는 체험분을 리뷰하게 돼서 진심을 다해서 해보려고 피 해요. 

✅ 휴대용은 하나씩 개별 포장되서 갖고 다니기 너무 좋아요. 티슈물기 마를 걱정도 안 되고, 위생적이라 좋아요. 
✅ 홈케어 용은 하나씩 티슈가 뽑혀서 사용할 때 너무 편해요.
딸려나오지 않고 잘 뜯겨요.  
✅ 부드러운 촉감으로 아이들도 거부감이 없는 소재에요. 
✅ 얼굴부터 꼬리까지 전체적으로 케어할 수 있어서 너무 좋은 티슈에요. 
📝 매일 산책하는 댕댕이라면 필수품이에요!!! 추천합니다.
reviews.content_en:
I was so happy to be selected for the BITE ME trial! Yay~~♥️
Leo goes for walks every day, so pet tissues are an essential item. I got to try both the portable and home care versions, so I'm going to give it my honest best effort.

✅ The portable ones come individually wrapped, so they're so convenient to carry around. I don't have to worry about the tissues drying out, and they're hygienic too.
✅ The home care version dispenses one tissue at a time, making it so easy to use. They don't tear awkwardly and come off cleanly.
✅ The soft texture means there's no resistance from the kids. It's a material that feels gentle.
✅ You can care for everything from face to tail, so it's such a great tissue!
📝 If you have a pup that goes for daily walks, this is a must-have!!! I recommend it.

#BITEME #BITEMEPetWipes #BITEMEFilsoGood #DogWipes #CatWipes #PetWipes

reviews.name: Y****
reviews.content:
예전에 우연한 기회로 펫티슈를 살 일 있어서 필소굿으로 구매를 했는데 이번에 체험단으로 뽑혀서 너무 좋네요! ❤️
패키징과 물티슈 질감, 두께, 향을 모두 만족 시켰던 제품!
향은 너무 강하지 않고 은은하게 나요.
특히나 휴대용은 한장씩 개별로 포장되어 있어서 가방에 갖고 다니면 너무 좋다. 👍
19-20kg인 우리집 멈머는 휴대용으로 3장 많이 쓰면 4장이면 훌륭하게 닦일 수 있다!
그리고 디자인도 나름 중요한데 너무 취저취줘!
조금의 보안점이하면 두께감이 좀 더 두꺼워도 좋을거 같네요. 🙏
꼭 써보라고 강추하고 싶은 아이템! 👍


#바잇미 #바잇미물티슈 #바잇미필소굿 #강아지물티슈 #고양이물티슈 #반려동물물티슈
reviews.content_en:
I happened to buy pet tissues before and got them from FILSO GOOD, and I'm so thrilled to have been selected for the trial this time! ❤️
A product that satisfied me in every way - packaging, wet tissue texture, thickness, and scent!
The scent isn't too strong and comes through subtly.
Especially the portable version is individually wrapped per sheet, so it's amazing to carry in my bag. 👍
My pup at 19-20kg uses 3 portable sheets normally, 4 at most, and gets cleaned up perfectly!
And design is important too - I absolutely love it!
The one small suggestion would be that it could be a bit thicker. 🙏
I'd strongly recommend this is an item you absolutely must try! 👍

#BITEME #BITEMEWipes #BITEMEFilsoGood #DogWipes #CatWipes #PetWipes

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
저희집 막내 금쪽이는 아직 7개월의 천방지축 금쪽이 퍼피 친구라서 펫티슈는 늘 필수로 필요한 물품 중 하나에요! 그래서 많은 펫티슈 제품을 사용해봤었는데 그 중에서도 제품력이 정말 좋은 것 같아요!!!

24개월이나 되는 넉넉한 사용기간이랑 전용 밀폐 용기가 있어서 쏙쏙 뽑아서 써도 되기 때문에 너무 편해요 !!
무엇보다 휴대용으로 개별 포장되어있는건 정말 최고!!! 산책 나갈 때 티슈를 통으로 들고다니면 은근 무거웠는데 간편하게 개별로 들고 다닐 수 있으니 짐 하나 덜었어요!
그리고 요즘 환경 생각해서 똥츄도 물에 녹는걸로 비싸도 사용 중인데 생분해성 재질로 되어 있어서 지구한테 덜 미안해도 되겠어요 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
Our youngest Geumjjok is a 7-month-old crazy ball of energy, so pet tissues are always one of those essential items we need! I've tried many pet tissue products, but this one really seems to have excellent quality!!!

With a generous 24-month shelf life and a dedicated airtight container, I can just pop them out and use them, so it's super convenient!!
Above all, the individually wrapped portable version is the best!!! When I used to carry a whole container of tissues on walks, it was pretty heavy, but now I can conveniently carry individual ones, which is one less thing to lug around!
And these days I care about the environment and even buy the pricey stuff that dissolves in water for poop bags. Since this is made with biodegradable material, I feel less guilty toward the planet ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
매일 가지고 노는 울 강쥐의 장난감 또는 용품은 위생이 걱정되고, 산책 후에 지저분해지는 발을 매일 씻기고 말리기에 번거롭지만 향균 99.9%의 안전한 성분의 필소굿 티슈로 간편하게 관리해 줄 수 있는 장점이 있어요👍🏻

또한 귀엽고 색 조합 너무 예쁜 전용 밀폐용기가 있어서  오랫동안 마르지 않고 촉촉하게 유지된답니다˘͈ᵕ˘͈

휴대용 물티슈는 개별 포장으로 되어있어 편리하고 위생적인 휴대가 가능하기 때문에 여러 방면에서 매력 있는 티슈 같네요😆

후각이 예민한 댕댕이들을 위해 은은한 라벤더 향으로 부담 없이 쾌적하고, 피부 자극 테스트도 완료하여 안심하고 사용할 수 있는 점도 좋은 것 같아요 ๑·̑◡･̑๑

우리 소중한 아가들을 위한 티슈를 고민 중이라면 💛바잇미 필소굿 펫티슈💛 강추합니당❗❗
reviews.content_en:
My pup plays with toys and items every day, which makes me worried about hygiene, and after walks, his paws get dirty. It's a hassle to wash and dry them daily, but I can conveniently manage them with FILSO GOOD tissues that have 99.9% antibacterial safety! 👍🏻

Also, the cute color combo on the dedicated airtight container is so pretty and keeps the tissues moist and fresh for a long time ˘͈ᵕ˘͈

The portable wet tissues are individually wrapped for convenience and hygienic portability, making them attractive in several ways 😆

For pups with sensitive noses, it has a subtle lavender scent that's refreshing without being overwhelming, and skin irritation tests have been completed, so you can use it with confidence. That's another great thing! ๑·̑◡･̑๑

If you're wondering about tissues for your precious pup, I strongly recommend 💛BITE ME FILSO GOOD Pet Tissues💛!! ❗❗

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
일주일 간 사용한 솔직후기입니다 🫶🏻 

일단 받자마자 패키징이 너무 예뻐서 놀랐어요 ㅠㅜ 아무때나 쓸 수 있게 강아지 물티슈는 늘 거실 테이블 위에 올려놓는 편인데 인테리어 소품으로도 좋을 것 같아요 👍🏻 

이전에 사용하던 펫티슈는 물티슈 한 통 다 쓸때마다 그 비닐류 포장 쓰레기를 버려야해서 너무 번거로웠는데 , 얘는 리필만 새로 끼워주면 되니까 너무 편리할 것 같은 거 있죠 ? 환경에도 좋을 것 같다는 생각이 들었어요 ! 

냄새도 은은하면서 엄청 좋아요 🤍 저희 강아지가 산책하다가 밖에서 지렁이댄스 추고 몸에서 냄새가 났는데 ㅠㅠ 집에 와서 필소굿 물티슈로 벅벅 닦아주니까 냄새도 싹 잡혔어요 !! 흙먼지 묻혀와도 이걸로 닦아주면 어느정도는 없어집니다 

그리고 휴대용 티슈는 한 장씩 낱개포장되어서 외출시에 갖고다니기 너무 좋을 것 같아요. 외출할 때 챙겨야 할 게 많다보니 부피가 적은 게 좋더라구요 🙌🏻 

다 쓰면 재구매할거에요 !!!
reviews.content_en:
Honest review after using for a week 🫶🏻

First, I was surprised by how pretty the packaging is when it arrived ㅠㅜ I usually keep dog wet tissues on the living room table so I can use them anytime, and I think it could work as a cute decor piece too! 👍🏻

The previous pet tissue I used had those vinyl packaging bags to throw away every time I finished a bottle, which was such a hassle. But with this one, I just need to pop in a refill, which is so convenient! I also got the feeling it's better for the environment!

The scent is subtle and smells amazing! 🤍 My dog was doing worm dances outside on a walk and came home smelling, but after wiping him down with FILSO GOOD wet tissues at home, the smell completely went away!! Even when he comes back with dirt, wiping him with this takes care of most of it.

And the portable tissues are individually wrapped, so it's so convenient to carry on outings. Since there's a lot to pack when going out, I appreciate how compact it is! 🙌🏻

I'll definitely repurchase when it runs out!!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
산책하면 발바닥과 배가 매우 더러워지는 털복숭이 입니다! 
발도 왕커서 왕 더러워 지는데, 요렇게 적당한 두깨로 슥슥 발만닦고 버리기 좋아요.
한장으로는 발 닦이고, 한장으로는 배랑 생식기부분 닦이는데 적당한 크기에 양도 많아서 대만족!
향도 자극적이거나 진하지 않아 아이가 거부감이 없고, 
무엇보다 아직까지 뭐든지 입으로 가져가고 물어뜯는 개춘기라 물티슈 같은건 성분이 좀만 자극적이여도 기침을 엄청 하는 애기인데 필소굿 물티슈는 기침1도 안해서 너무너무 좋아요 🥰
reviews.content_en:
My furry friend gets very dirty on paws and belly after walks!
His paws are huge and get super dirty, but the perfect thickness makes it easy to wipe just his feet and toss. One sheet for the paws and one for the belly and private area - the size is just right and the amount is plenty, so I'm totally satisfied!
The scent isn't irritating or strong, so the pup doesn't resist it.
Best of all, he's still in that puppy phase where he carries everything in his mouth and chews, so anything with stimulating components makes him cough a lot. But with FILSO GOOD wet tissues, he doesn't cough at all - it's amazing! 🥰

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
산책 다녀온 후에는 무조건 루틴으로 펫티슈를 사용하는 데요, 원래 타 제품 사용하다가 바잇미에서 출시 되서 믿고사는 바잇미 메이드 제품으로 겟챠해보았습니다 :)
패키지 디자인도 너무 귀여워서 어디 숨기지 않고 꺼내 놓을 수 있어서 사용하기 정말 편리합니다!
그리고 통에서 끊기지 않고 한장씩 쏙쏙 잘 뽑혀서 마음이 정말 편안해요🤍 

휴대용으로 개별포장된 물티슈는 산책 중에 응꼬를 깨끗하게 닦아주거나 얼굴에 자꾸 흙을 묻히는 제트에게 아주 딱이에요!
개별포장으로 무겁지 않고 간편하게 들고 다닐 수 있어 정말 좋아요! 💙
reviews.content_en:
After walks, I always use pet tissues as part of my routine. I usually used other brands, but when BITE ME released this, I decided to trust the brand and get their BITE ME-made product :)
The package design is so cute that I can leave it out without hiding it anywhere, making it really convenient to use!
And the tissues come out one by one so smoothly from the container without tearing - it gives me such peace of mind! 🤍

The portable individually-wrapped wet tissues are perfect for cleaning up after poop during walks or for wiping Jet's face when she gets dirt on it!
Being individually wrapped means it's not heavy and I can conveniently carry it around - it's really great! 💙

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
요것이 있다면 하루 세번 산책도 두렵지 않아욧!!! 사람 물티슈로 발 닦여주니 바둥 바둥 피하길래 조금 번거롭지만 거즈 손수건 하루 세장씩 빨고 삶으며 쓰고 있었어요~ㅠㅠ 귀찮음보다도 닦이고 나면 빨개지는 피부가 걱정이였는데, 요거 요거 물건입니당..

1. 일단 사람 물티슈는 훽 도망가버렸눈데, 이건 눈 슬쩍 감고 ‘어서 닦이거라’ 하고 누워있어주네요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ(성분 차이를 느끼는 걸까..?)

2. 닦이고 나면 붉어지는게 적어요. 일단 피하질 않으니 박박 안 닦여도 되서 그런거 같아요!

3. 향이 너무 좋아요. 꼬순내를 인위적으로 덮어버리는게 아니라 은은하게 향을 입히네요~? 너무 내 스타일,,

4. 저가형 티슈 중에 한번 닦이면 느슨하게 펼쳐지는 거 있잖아요~ 이건 탄탄해서 네발 다 닦이고도 끄떡없어요!

사람 물티슈랑 무슨 차이가 있으려나 싶었는데 직접 쓰는 우리 갱얼쥐 반응이 증명하네요.. ‘응 이거 내꾸~’ ㅋㅋㅋ 알았어.. 이제 우리 물티슈는 각자 맞는걸로 쓰자^^,, 바잇미 물티슈 필소굿 추천 합니다💛🧸💙
reviews.content_en:
With this, even walking three times a day isn't scary!!! When I tried wiping paws with regular human wet tissues, she'd struggle and squirm, so it was a bit annoying. Instead, I was washing and boiling three gauze handkerchiefs a day and using those... ㅠㅠ It was less about the hassle and more that her skin would turn red after wiping, which I was worried about. But this product...

1. First, she runs away from human wet tissues, but with this, she just lies down like 'go ahead and wipe' with her eyes half-closed ㅋㅋㅋㅋ (Can she feel the difference in ingredients..?)

2. Her skin doesn't get as red after wiping. Since she doesn't resist, I don't have to scrub hard.

3. The scent is amazing. It doesn't artificially mask the smell but adds a subtle fragrance~? Totally my style,, 

4. You know how some cheap tissues get all loose and falling apart after one wipe? This one stays sturdy - I can wipe all four paws and it's still holding up!

I wondered what the difference could be between this and human wet tissues, but my pup's reaction proved it... 'Yep, this is mine~' ㅋㅋㅋ Alright.. let's use what's right for each of us now ^^,, I recommend BITE ME wet tissues FILSO GOOD 💛🧸💙

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
신책후 몸과발을 닦을때마다 매번 번거로움이 있어서
타제품을 구매하고 써봐도 만족스럽지 못할때가 많았어요 ㅠ

그런데 바잇미필소굿은! 크기도 적당하게 크고 발바닥을 닦아도건조하게 마르지않아서 좋더라구요!!

개별포장이 되어있는것과 롤형식으로되서 뽑을수잇지만 리필시 겉에본품은 그대로 두고 안에있는것만 갈아끼우는형식도 
너무너무 편해서 좋았습니다!!
순한소재로 얼굴닦기에도 최적이엿어요 ㅎ 
재구매 당연히 있습니다
reviews.content_en:
Every time I wiped my pup's body and paws after walks, there was always hassle involved. Even when I bought and tried other products, I was often unsatisfied ㅠ

But BITE ME FILSO GOOD is! The size is appropriately large, and even after wiping the paw pads, they don't dry out - that's great!!

The fact that it comes in individual packaging and also has a roll format where you can pull them out, but when you need a refill, you just swap the inner cartridge while keeping the outer container - that's so convenient!
It's made with gentle material, so it's perfect for wiping the face too ㅎ
I'll definitely repurchase.

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
반려동물의 피부는 사람보다 훨씬 약해서 일반 물티슈를 쓰면 깨끗한 세정이 어려울 뿐만 아니라 피부에 자극을 유발할 수 있다고 하는데요 

필소굿 펫티슈는 반려동물 피부 자극 테스트 완료한 동물용 의약외품으로 자극없이 부드럽게 닦이더라구요!!

 눈에 쏙 들어오는 귀여운패키징도 마음에 들었어요 원통형으로 되어있어서 한장씩 뽑아서 쓰기 너무 편하더라구요 그리고 휴대용 티슈도 있어서 바깥 이동시 휴대하기도 편리할 것 같아요 ᥫ᭡

저희집 고양이는 응꼬 그루밍을 잘 못해서 엉덩이만 씻기기 너무 번거로웠는데 펫티슈로 편리하게 자극없이 닦으니까 너무 좋더라구요!! 그리고 발에 모래 묻히고 나왔을 때도 너무 잘 닦여서 좋았어요

냥빨하기 매번 고역이었는데 티슈로 몸 전체를 부드럽게 닦아주기도 좋았어요 덕분에 뽀송 고양이로 거듭났답니다 게다가 소독 및 향균 기능이 있어서 이동장 청소하기도 너무 좋았답니다!!
reviews.content_en:
Pet skin is much more delicate than human skin, so using regular wet tissues can make thorough cleaning difficult and even cause skin irritation. But FILSO GOOD pet tissues are veterinary OTC drugs with completed pet skin irritation tests, so they wipe gently without irritation!!

I also loved the adorable packaging that catches your eye. Since it's cylindrical, it's so easy to pull out one sheet at a time. And there's also a portable version, so it would be convenient for travel ᥫ᭡

My cat doesn't groom her rear end well, so washing just her butt was always a chore. But with pet tissues, I can clean it conveniently without irritation, which is amazing!! And when she comes home with sand on her paws, it wipes off so well!

Cat bathing was always an ordeal, but now I can gently wipe her whole body with tissues. Thanks to this, she's turned into a fluffy cat! Plus, with disinfecting and antibacterial functions, it's great for cleaning her carrier too!!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
자주 애용하는 바잇미에서 🖤필소굿 저자극 펫티슈🖤를 제 받았어요!
모찌는 1일 1산책 필수 강아지인데 매일 발 닦이기에는 발이 건조해지니까 펫티슈가 저자극이라서 더 좋았어요! 모찌는 향에 민감한데 냄새를 맡아도 재채기를 안하는 거보니 더 만족〰

본품은 한 장씩 쏙쏙 뽑아서 쓰는 제품이고 리필용을 넣어서 계속 쓸 수 있답니다! 노랑색과 하늘색 조합, 귀여운 곰돌이🧸 아주 말해뭐해,,💛 그냥 모찌맘 취향저격쓰

심지어 휴대용은 아주 간편,,🐼 한 번 쓰고 버리면 되니까 위생적+편리함 다 갖춘 제품🖤
모찌 가방에 3-4개는 들고다녀야겠어요!🐼🤍

이렇게 좋은 제품 다들 한 번 써보시는 걸 추천드려요!🔥

✔ 레이온 100%
✔ 향균 밑 소독
✔ 6단계 정제수
✔ 에센셜 오일 함유
reviews.content_en:
I got 🖤BITE ME FEEL SO GOOD low-irritant pet tissues🖤 from a brand I use regularly!
Mochi is a dog that needs 1 walk per day, and since washing her paws daily made them dry, I really appreciated how low-irritant these tissues are! Mochi is sensitive to scents, but she doesn't sneeze when sniffing them, so I'm even more satisfied〰

The main product lets you pull out one sheet at a time and you can keep using it by refilling! The yellow and light blue combo with the cute bear design🧸 is just... chef's kiss,,💛 It totally hits my taste as a dog mom

Plus the portable version is super convenient,,🐼 Just use one and throw it away, so it's hygienic AND practical🖤
I need to carry 3-4 of these in Mochi's bag!🐼🤍

I recommend everyone give this great product a try!🔥

✔ 100% Rayon
✔ Antibacterial and disinfectant
✔ 6-stage purified water
✔ Contains essential oils

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 핑크색통 H제품 사용하고있었는데 유통기한이 짧기도하고, 사용하던 용량이 판매를 안해서 최근엔 물티슈를 이것저것 쓰고있었어요. 그러던와중에 필소굿 다시 만나서 넘 좋아요~! 필소굿 제품은 예전에 사용했던적이 있었는데 문제가 생겨 사라지는 바람에 다시 H제품으로 갈아탔던...필소굿도 예전엔 유통기한이 길지 않았는데 리뉴얼된 제품은 유통기한이 확~ 늘었더라구요.비숑아이는 밥먹는후에 입가가 지저분해져서 물티슈는 필수인데 향도 진하지 않고 자극이 없어서 얼굴이랑 눈가 닦기에 좋아요. 소중이에 쉬야 잔뜩 묻었을때도 닦아주면 쉬야냄새가 감쪽같이 사라져요.특히 맘에 드는건 휴대용 물티슈가 개별포장된거에요. 휴대하고 다니기 가볍고 물티슈가 마를 걱정없어서 좋은거 같아요. 전에 사용했던 제품이라 좋은건 너무 잘 알고있어서 앞으로 물티슈는 필소굿으로 정착할거같아요~
reviews.content_en: I was using the pink container H brand product, but it had a short expiration date, and they stopped selling the size I was using, so I've been trying various wet wipes lately. In the meantime, I ran into FEEL SO GOOD again and I'm so happy~! I had used FEEL SO GOOD before, but it disappeared due to some issues so I switched to H brand instead...FEEL SO GOOD didn't have a long shelf life back then, but I noticed the renewed product has a much longer expiration date now. My Bichon's face gets messy after eating, so wet wipes are essential, and since the scent isn't strong and there's no irritation, it's great for wiping her face and around her eyes. Even when my precious pup gets pee all over her, wiping it away makes the urine smell completely disappear. What I love most is that the portable wet wipes come individually packaged. It's light to carry around and I don't have to worry about the wipes drying out, which is great. Since I've used this product before, I already know how good it is, so I think I'll stick with FEEL SO GOOD wet wipes from now on~

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content:
하루에 3-4번 산책 필수인 쵸쵸에게 꼭 필요한 펫티슈인데 향도 괜찮고 두께도 괜찮아서 발바닥 닦기에도 얼굴닦기에도 딱이었어요

제일 맘에들었던건 휴대용 펫티슈로 한개씩 들어있어서 외출할때편하게 갖고 다닐 수 있을거 같아서 만족만족 합니다
reviews.content_en:
Chocho needs a walk 3-4 times a day, so pet tissues are essential, and the scent is nice and the thickness is perfect for wiping both paw pads and face

What I loved most was that the portable pet tissues come individually so it's easy to carry them when going out. I'm very satisfied!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 산책하고 발 닦거나 응가한 뒤 옹동이 닦아줄 때도 유용해요!! 강아지가 좋아하는 라텍스나 실리콘 장난감에 침이랑 이물잘 잔뜩 묻었을 때도 간편하게 슥 뽑아서 닦아주니 너무 편하네요! 향이 강할까봐 걱정했는데 완전 은은하게 나는 라벤더 향기라서 애들한테 자극도 없고 만족스러운 물티슈에요😳 룰루랄라 외출 시에는 개별포장된 거 하나씩 쏙쏙 가방에 넣어다닐 수 있어서 휴대성까지 잡은!!!!
reviews.content_en: They're useful after walks for wiping paws or cleaning up after poop!! When my dog's favorite latex or silicone toys get covered in saliva and dirt, I can just pull one out and wipe them clean so easily! I was worried the scent might be too strong, but it has a very subtle lavender fragrance with no irritation to the dogs—it's a satisfying wet wipe😳 And when going out, I can toss the individually packaged ones into my bag—it's got portability covered!!!!

reviews.name: H****
reviews.content:
산책하고 물로 닦이면 발사탕을 자주 하고 너무 건조한 것 같아서 항상 고민이었는데 써보니 너무 간편하고 좋아요!
일반물티슈는 닦으면서도 괜찮을까 걱정인데 이렇게 강아지 전용으로 나오는 물티슈를 쓰니 훨씬 안심이에요
양도 넉넉하고 하나씩 뽑아쓰니까 더 간편하네요
질감도 두껍고 좋고 한장이 커서 넉넉하게 발도 다 닦을 수 있어요
앞으로 떨어지면 구매해서 사용할 것 같아요
reviews.content_en:
After walks, my pup would get paw licking issues from washing with water and the paws seemed really dry, which was always a concern. But these are so convenient and great!
With regular wet wipes I'm always worried while wiping, but using dog-specific wet wipes like these is so much more reassuring.
The quantity is generous and since you pull out one sheet at a time, it's even more convenient.
The texture is thick and nice, and each sheet is big enough to thoroughly wipe all four paws.
I think I'll buy more when I run out!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
h사 너무 잘 찢어짐
P사는 가격이 사악함 
등의 이유로 재구매 고민하고 있던 차에
적당한 제품을 만났어요!
향도 과하지 않고 너무 잘 찢어지지도 않아요 ㅎㅎ
특히 외출할때 부피차지 안하게 낱개포장 되어서 너무 만족해요
reviews.content_en:
H brand tears way too easily
P brand pricing is crazy
With these concerns, I found a decent product!
The scent isn't overpowering and it doesn't tear easily at all ㅎㅎ
Especially love how the individual packaging takes up no space when I'm out and about, so I'm really satisfied!

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content:
필소굿 티슈 짱좋아여!!
일단 겉패키지가 너무 귀엽구용ㅠㅠㅠㅠ 어디있나 한참 찾지않게 딱 보이고 너무너무 귀엽습니당 
티슈는 작지도 크지도 않은크기고 엄청 촉촉하진않아요 오히려 너무 물이있는 티슈가아니라 습진이 일어나지않고 이물질만 닦일거같아 더 좋았습니다!!🩶🩶
reviews.content_en:
FEEL SO GOOD tissues are amazing!!
First of all, the outside packaging is so cute ㅠㅠㅠㅠ You can spot it right away without searching around and it's just SO cute💕
The tissue itself is neither too small nor too big and isn't overly wet—actually, I prefer that they're not too wet since super moist tissues can cause eczema, but these just wipe away dirt which is better!!🩶🩶

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
체험단으로 당첨되어 써봤어요
기존 쓰던 티슈통보다 작아 쓰기 편했습니다 티슈 자체는 좀 더 도톰하였고요
일회용은 작년에 쓸 때 보다 촉촉하고 잘 닦이는 느낌이었는데 제작일 차이같기도 합니다ㅋㅋㅋ 산책 후 바로 닦아줄 수 있어 일회용이 유용할 때가 많아요
reviews.content_en:
I tried it as a trial participant.
It's smaller than the tissue box I was using before, so it's easier to use. The tissue itself is a bit thicker.
The disposable ones felt more moist and wiped well compared to when I used them last year—might be a production date difference ㅋㅋㅋ Being able to wipe right after a walk makes the disposable version really useful.

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
바잇미 필소굿 펫티슈 디자인 이렇게 귀엽다니🤍
가장 큰 장점은
-원단이 도톰해서 골고루 한장으로 해결 가능해서 좋아요
-리필이 가능하고 한장씩 나와서 우르르 뽑히지 않아요
-밀폐가 잘되어 마르지도 않구요!

휴대용은 산책가방, 풉백에 넣어다니기 부피차지 없이 야외배변에 찰떡이에요 :)
향이 은은하니 개봉하자마자 냄새부터 킁킁 거립니다
엉덩이 닦아도 저자극이라 부드러운 사용감이에요
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME FEEL SO GOOD pet tissues have such a cute design🤍
The biggest advantages are:
-The fabric is thick so one sheet handles everything nicely
-It's refillable and pulls out one sheet at a time so it doesn't unravel
-It seals well so it doesn't dry out!

The portable version is perfect for taking in a walking bag or backpack without taking up space, and is perfect for outdoor bathroom needs :)
The scent is subtle so the pup sniffs as soon as you open it.
Even when wiping her bottom, it's low-irritant so it feels gentle!

reviews.name: 위****
reviews.content:
🤍코코는 매일 산책 후에 항상 물로 발을 닦아주었는데요
 매일 물로 닦으니 소중한 젤리도 건조해지고
말리는 시간도 오래 걸려 코코도 저도 스트뤠스였는데요😫
바잇미 필소굿 저자극 펫티슈로 간편하게 쓱 닦아주니
코코도 저도 만족했답니다.☺️

기존에 사용하는 펫티슈는 묘하기 소독제 냄새가 나서
사두고 잘 안 쓰게 됐는데
바잇미 필소굿 저자극 티슈는 은은한 라벤더 향이 나서 너무 만족스러웠습니다👍🏻

또한 휴대용으로 한 장씩 챙겨서 산책 나가면 
응가💩도 말끔하게 정리할 수 있으니 너무 좋았어요!

다 쓰면 또 재구매할거예요!!! 바잇미 너무 감사해요🩶
reviews.content_en:
🤍Coco needed her paws washed with water every day after walks, but washing with water daily was drying out her precious toe beans and taking forever to dry, so both Coco and I were stressed😫
But now I just quickly wipe with BITE ME FEEL SO GOOD low-irritant pet tissues and both Coco and I are happy.☺️

The pet tissues I used before had a weirdly strong disinfectant smell so I ended up not using them much, but BITE ME FEEL SO GOOD low-irritant tissues have a subtle lavender scent so I'm super satisfied👍🏻

Plus I can grab individual sheets for our walks and keep everything clean even after poop💩 which is amazing!

I'll definitely repurchase when we run out!!! Thank you so much BITE ME🩶

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
배변후에 항상 닦아주기때문에 성분 괜찮고 좀 덜 자극적인걸 사용하려고 해요! 이번에 바잇미 필소굿 저자국 티슈를 사용해봤는데 잘닦이고 발진도 안나고 괜찮은것같아요 💛 
일회용 티슈는 하나하나 뜯어쓰기 조으네용! 
당분간 이 티슈 사용해볼 예정입니다 🫶🏻
reviews.content_en: I always wipe after my pup does their business, so I'm looking for products with good ingredients and less irritation! I tried BITE ME FEEL GOOD low-residue tissues this time, and they wipe well, don't cause any rashes, and seem great 💛 I love that the disposable tissues come individually so you can tear off one at a time! I'm planning to use these tissues for a while 🫶🏻

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
향이 자극적이지 않아서 좋아요!!
티슈가 톡!톡!잘 뽑혀서 편히며,두께가 도톰하고 손바닥보다 큰 크기가 넘넘 맘에 드네요!!
reviews.content_en: I love that the scent isn't irritating!! The tissues pop out really smoothly and conveniently, plus the thickness is perfect and the size is bigger than my palm - I absolutely love it!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
다냔한 물티슈를 사용을 해봤지만 이 물티슈가 너무너무 좋어요!!
개별 포장이 되어있는 부분도 위생적으로 좋은거같아요!!
그리고 물도 많으면서 촉촉한편이라 만족합니다!
reviews.content_en: I've tried many different pet wipes, but these are SO good!! The individual packaging is really hygienic too!! And I'm satisfied because they have plenty of moisture while still being nicely saturated!

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
일단 이 상품 장점이 너무 많아요 !!!!! 

1. 디자인이 이쁘고 귀여워서 집 어디에 놔두어도 잘 어울린다!
2. 부드러워서 강아지한테 사용할 때 마음이 편하다.
3. 가격대비 양이 많아서 너무!!!! 만족스럽다!

산책하고 사용하는 고정템이 될 거 같아요!!
reviews.content_en:
This product has so many great qualities!!!!! 

1. The design is pretty and cute - it looks good anywhere in the house!
2. It's soft so I feel comfortable using it on my dog.
3. The quantity is amazing for the price!!!!

It's going to become my go-to item for walks!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
악. 세일가보다 또 가격인하ㅜㅠ물건은 좋아요..
필소굿. 이름이 찰떡이네요. 패키지도 이쁘고 무엇보다 물티슈가 도톰해서 기분이 좋아요. 물기도 적지 않아서 닦기 좋아요.
산책때 휴대하기도 좋겠구요. 4개(200매)샀는데 유통기한은 무시하고 더쟁여야하나 욕심나요ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Ugh, the price dropped again below the sale price ㅜㅠ but the product is good.. FEEL GOOD - what a perfect name! The packaging is also pretty and most importantly, the wipes are nice and thick which makes me happy. There's plenty of moisture too so they wipe well. They'll be great to carry on walks. I bought 4 packs (200 sheets) but I'm tempted to stock up more and ignore the expiration date ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 본품은 집에 두고 하나씩 쏙쏙 뽑아쓰니 편하고, 휴대용도 산책할 때 챙겨다니기 너무너무 편해요☺️ 리필까지 있어서 마음이 든든합니당!!!ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I keep the main pack at home and just pull out one sheet at a time which is so convenient, and the portable version is SO easy to carry on walks ☺️ Plus there are refills available so I feel reassured!!!ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
본품, 리필, 휴대용으로 종류가 다양해서 상황에 맞게 선택해서 사용할 수 있어서 좋아요💛
-
소독이 되는 물티슈라 여기저기 다양하게 쓸 수 있고 무엇보다 저자극이라 안심해서 쓸 수 있어요☺️
-
💡Tip
휴대용 물티슈는 산책하고 차 타기 전 발 닦는 용도로 추천해요👍🏻
reviews.content_en:
I like that there are different types - regular, refill, and portable - so I can choose based on the situation 💛
-
Since these are disinfecting wipes, I can use them for all sorts of things and most importantly they're low-irritant so I use them with peace of mind ☺️
-
💡Tip
I recommend the portable wipes for wiping paws after walks and before getting in the car 👍🏻

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 완전 득템했어요! 산책시, 집에서 소변 실수시, 동네카페 다닐때도 완전 편하고 좋아요! 🐶🪴♥️ 이거 없으면 불편해졌답니다..ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ많이 쟁여서 카페가서 급할때 하나씩 나눠드리면 다들 너무 좋아하더라구요! 귀염뽀짝 패키지는 덤이에요🫶🏼 요고 하나 덕분에 삶의 질 상승 했습니다!🤟🏼
reviews.content_en: Total score!! They're perfect for after walks, when there are accidents at home, and even when going to local cafes 🐶🪴♥️ Life without these would be inconvenient now..ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ I stock up and share one with friends when we're at cafes and everyone loves them! The adorable packaging is a bonus 🫶🏼 My quality of life has improved thanks to this one product! 🤟🏼

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
바잇미에서 1개입 물티슈 나와서 그거사면서 비교해보려고 허레이것도 같이 샀어요
사실 이가격은 펫택스가 빠방한 느낌이 다소 드는대..
 산책때 편하고 대체할만항 게 없으니 어쩔수엄쪙
바잇미께 더 얇을거라생각했는데 크게 차이는 없구요 허래이꺼는 무향 바잇미꺼는 에센셜오일향이 진하게 납니다. 레이온이라 다 비슷하게 늠겨지는데 허래이께 비데티슈처럼 변기에 넣어도 되는 특징이있네용 사실 응아 집에와서 변기에 안넣으면 의미가 없긴 한데 여튼 그렇습니당 바잇미 에센셜오일향이 좀 쎄서 가격같으면 허레이꺼 실거같긴한데 더 써봐야겠어요
강쥐 산책시 돈고 고추닦는 용이라..
reviews.content_en: BITE ME came out with single-pack wipes so I bought those and decided to compare them with these too. To be honest, this price point feels a bit pricey for a pet product.. but they're convenient for walks and there's nothing comparable so what can you do. I thought these would be thinner than BITE ME but there's not much difference. These are unscented while BITE ME has a strong essential oil scent. Since they're both rayon they're pretty similar, but these have the feature of being flushable like bidet tissue. Honestly it doesn't matter much if you don't flush at home after pooping but anyway, BITE ME's essential oil scent is kind of strong so if the price were the same I'd probably go with these, but I need to try them more. Since it's for wiping after poops on walks...

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content:
산책할 때 똥꼬 닦아주려고 구입했어요
향도 강하지 않고 한두개 챙겨가서 쓰기 좋아요
유통기한때메 세일하길래 구입해봤는데 괘안네요 물티슈 반복해서 여닫으면 나중에 말라있는데 한장씩이라 위생적이고 쓸때마다 새거라 좋아요 다 쓰면 재구매할꺼 같아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I bought these to wipe my pup's behind after walks. The scent isn't strong and it's convenient to carry just one or two. I bought them because they were on sale due to expiration dates and they're great. Regular wipes dry out if you open and close the pack repeatedly, but since these are individual sheets they're more hygienic and you get a fresh one each time - that's the best part! I'll probably rebuy once I finish these ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
유통기한은 얼마 안남았지만 
대부분 물티슈들은 유통기한이 제조일로부터 1년정도 거든요 이 제품은 6개월로 기재 되어있는거라 하니 사실 만든지는 얼마 안돼서 믿고 구매했어요~
빨리 쓰면 되지용 ㅎㅎ 
한개 써봤는데 향도 소재도 괜찮더라구요 
제 가방에 한두개씩 넣어 놓고 급할때 쓰기 좋을 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en: The expiration date isn't too far away, but most pet wipes have about a 1-year shelf life from the manufacturing date. This product is listed as 6 months, so it's fairly new, which is why I bought it with confidence~ You just need to use them quickly lol. I tried one pack and both the scent and material are nice. I think it'll be great to keep a couple in my bag for emergencies!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
펫티슈 휴대용 한장씩 들어있어 쓰기도 편하고 좋아요~
날짜임박템이라 저렴히 구해했어요~
근데 빨리써야할꺼 같아요~
여튼 잘쓰고 있어요~
reviews.content_en: The portable pet tissue comes individually, which is convenient and great~ I got it cheap since it's a clearance item~ But I'll need to use them quickly~ Anyway, I'm using them well~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
애기물티슈도 강아지피부에는 안좋다는 얘기를 듣고 펫티슈릍 이것저것 쓰고 있는데 써본 결과 닦일때 하나하나 뜯어서 해야되는 불편함은 있지만 확실히 더 위생적이고 안전하단 생각이 들어서 좋습니다
그리고 성분또한 안전하니 금상첨화입니다
reviews.content_en: I heard that even baby wipes aren't good for dogs' skin, so I've been trying various pet tissues. After using this, while there's the inconvenience of having to peel them off one by one, it definitely feels more hygienic and safe, which is great. Plus the ingredients are safe, so it's even better!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 산책갈때마다 풉백에 늘 챙겨다니는 물티슈예요 우리아이 똥꼬를 지켜주는ㅎㅎ 작고 하나씩 개별포장 되어있어서 풉백에 넣어다니기 좋아서 떨어지지않게 늘 구매하고있어요
reviews.content_en: These are wet wipes I always carry in my backpack whenever we go for walks - they protect our baby's rear end lol. They're small and individually wrapped, which makes them perfect for throwing in a backpack, so I keep buying them so I never run out.

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
기존에 허** 제품을 사용하고 있었는데 아이가 각화증이 심해서 그런건지 너무 잘 찢어지더라고요;;;
그래서 다른제품 고민중에 필소굿 좋은 기회로 써봤는데 허**이랑 다르게 잘 안 찢어져요!!
솔직한 리뷰 쓰자면 허**보단 수분감은 살짝 부족한거 같아요 근데 잘 안 찢어져서 저는 만족해요🩵
허**은 닦다보면 찢어져서 계속 뽑아서 쓰느라 금방 쓰는데…(거의 5장 뽑아써요…;)
필소굿은 안 찢어져서 한두장?만 있으면 다 닦아요👍
reviews.content_en: I used to use [brand] products, but my baby's skin gets really irritated, so they kept tearing easily;;; So while I was considering other products, I tried FEELSO GOOD and it's different from [brand] - it doesn't tear nearly as easily!! To be honest, compared to [brand], the moisture feels slightly lacking, but since it doesn't tear, I'm satisfied 🩵 [Brand] tears while you're wiping so you keep pulling out more sheets and go through them quickly... (I end up using almost 5 sheets...) FEELSO GOOD doesn't tear, so just one or two sheets cleans everything up 👍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
휴대용으로 최고에요
카페갈때 산책후 쓰기 딱 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Perfect for on-the-go! Great to use after going to cafes or walks.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 성분이 순해서 검색하다 구매했어여~ 포장도 깔끔하고 휴대용으로 사용하기 너무 좋을것 같아여~^^
reviews.content_en: I bought them after searching because the ingredients are gentle~ The packaging is neat and they seem perfect for portable use~^^

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
낱개 포장이라 휴대하기 좋고
유통기간 임박이지만  저렴하게 사서 좋아요
다른제품 물티슈 자제가 1년 2년 유통기간이 반면에
이건 6개월이니  앞으로 6개월 쓴다해도 부담이 없네요
reviews.content_en: Individual packaging makes them easy to carry, and even though the expiration date is approaching, I got them at a discount which is great! While other pet wipes have 1-2 year shelf lives, this one is 6 months, so even if I use them for the next 6 months, there's no pressure!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 사이즈가 조금 작은게 아쉽지만 두꺼워서 잘 찢어지지 않고 휴대용으로 딱 좋은것 같습니다!! 유통기한은 그다지 중요한가같진 않아요!! 더 구매할걸 후회합니다 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's a shame the size is a bit small, but since they're thick, they don't tear easily and they seem perfect for carrying around!! I don't think the expiration date is that important!! I regret not buying more lol

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 사이즈나 두께도 적당하고 낱개포장이라 좋아요. 휴대하기도 간편하고요.
reviews.content_en: The size and thickness are reasonable, and individual packaging is great. They're convenient to carry too.
